OFIService (lines 1159-1175): Session-aware cache TTL (60s RTH / 120s Globex) correctly implemented

_get_current_session_type() helper (lines 1922-1933): Correctly detects RTH (09:30-16:00 ET weekdays) vs Globex
macro_refresh_loop (lines 8859-8920): Session-aware refresh interval (60s RTH / 120s Globex) with 80% TTL threshold

context_for_next_testing_agent: Cache optimization features fully tested and working. Key findings: (1) VP D-1 cache is persistent per session (keyed by symbol_prev_session_start). (2) VP Session cache has 5min TTL. (3) OFI uses session-aware TTL (60s RTH / 120s Globex). (4) Macro data uses session-aware TTL (20min RTH / 60min Globex). (5) Current time is Globex session, so longer TTLs are active. (6) All endpoints return complete data with real DataBento trades. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cache_optimization.py

feature_verification.VP D-1 cache persistence: Working - POC identical across 3 consecutive calls
feature_verification.No _get_macro_ttl errors: Verified - no errors in backend logs
